mechanics.text:
CHARACTER CREATION
SPECIAL FORCES OPERATIVE
Following the oss of their home on the world of Tikonov in the Fourth Succession Wal, your parents immigrated to Betelgeuse, where they both worked for Firmir Commercial, an entertainment equipment producer that exports directly to other Successor States Sent to high school, you excelled above all expectations and won scholarship for your innovative sales techniques You spent the summer before leaving for college with your favorite grandfather, who spun yarns of his proud Russian heritage on Tikonov ad how the hated Federated Suns stole it from you The stories made you decide to enlist and become marine: along the way; however; you ran up gambling debt with the locat mob. You did well enough in your  advanced  training move into   special forces where you became good friends with Manu Sharma_ Sharma later left Capellan service t0 help form the Heavy Hell Raisers new merce- nary unit; your friendship with him gives you ties t0 mercenary circles_ The invasion tne Federated Commonwealth'$ Sarna March per- suaded you become covert operative to further the war effort; Your ties t0 Firmir Commercial and your knowledge tri-vid projectors allowed you become entertainment salesman in the Disputed Territories, providing invaluable aid to Zhanzeng Guang terror- ists in overthrowing local governments After your superiors cut your mission short, you imme diately signed up for operations against the St Ives Compact, swept up in the Xin Sheng movement along with the rest the Capellan Confederation_ Your heroic efforts saved your unit when your commanding   officer died fighting against the Second St. Ives Lancers on Indicass in early 3061, earning you field commission. Your elite status gives you remark- able degree of personal  flexibility; yoU can take any job that does not directly oppose the Confederation_ and YoU always welcome challenge_
Affiliation: Capellan Confederation (p_ 281; Stage 1: Early Childhood (Blue Color) Event Roll (p. 331. Stage 2: Late Childhood (High School) Event Roll 11 (p. 38}. Stage 3: Higher Education (Military Enlistment: Marine AIT) Event Roil 41k. Stage 3: Higher Education (Military Enlistment: Special Forces Special Training) Event Roll 41). Stage Reae Life Covert Ops) Event Roll 481. Stage Real Life (Tour of Duty: Inner Sphere) Event Roll 10 (p. 50).
72
